definition: A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 3934.
interpretive_note:
Primary Source Evidence: "...Thank you so much for the loan of the $200. I understand now that my Bantam money ($4,000) will arrive this month, so there should be no problem. However, the Douoleuay monies failed to appear, since Ballantine, the subsidiary publisher, failed to pay in on time; therefore I had to cash the check yesterday. Doubleday is attempting to get the money for me anyhow, since we are on such good terms*

W..."
card_description: Vast Active Living Intelligence System. PKD's primary designation for the divine intelligence that contacted him in 2-3-74.
full_description: Vast Active Living Intelligence System. PKD's primary designation for the divine intelligence that contacted him in 2-3-74.
